product.description: SUPER White Coffee exudes the aroma of a light char, reminiscent of the traditional heritage of charcoal roasted beans in the 19th century. Our roasting techniques faithfully capture the rich, smooth, buttery characteristics of this classic brew

metaData.Key Information: Inspired from the traditional coffee-shop culture in Ipoh, Malaysia, dating back to the 19th Century. Super's roasting techniques capture the richer, smoother, buttery characteristics of this classic brew. The 3 in 1 Roasted Hazelnut White Coffee is a premium blend of arabica and robusta coffee to produce a rich and buttery smooth profile that is overall a well-balanced taste. The beans are charcoal roasted to perfection which offers a rich nutty taste to the traditional favourite.
metaData.Preparation:
• Hot:
Add 80°C hot water (200ml) and enjoy
• Cold:
1. Add 80°C hot water (80ml)
2. Stir well
3. Add ice and serve

metaData.Ingredients:
Creamer [Glucose Syrup, Sunflower Oil, Coconut Oil, Stabilisers (Ins 340(Ii), Ins 452(I)), Sodium Caseinate (Cow'S Milk), Emulsifiers (Ins 471, Ins 481(I)), Anticaking Agent (Ins 551)], Sugar, Maltodextrin, Instant Coffee (7%), Permitted Flavourings, Salt, Permitted Sweetener (Sucralose).
Contains Stabilisers, Emulsifiers, Anticaking Agent As Permitted Food Conditioners. All Additives Are Of Plant Or Synthetic Origin.
Contains Milk.
metaData.Key Information:
Introducing Singapore’s first cold soluble pandan flavoured white coffee that is Healthier Choice!

Our latest addition to the OldTown White Coffee range has a perfect smooth blend of the OldTown White Coffee, witth fragrant pandan aroma.

What makes OLDTOWN White Coffee tastefully different and stand out as the true white coffee brand? On top of our perfect blend of premium beans, and brewed with the same roasting process as when it was first created, we also strive to deliver the best in our products by keeping true to a system that adheres to diligent R&D through our many years of experience. All this to ensure that our customers are able to enjoy the best white coffee every time, and there is a product to suit all different coffee lovers out there!
metaData.Preparation: Empty the coffee sachet contents into a cup and simply add 180ml of water (4 to 80 Degree Celsius). Soluble in cold water.

metaData.Key Information: Finely roasted high grade coffee beans meticulously brewed to perfection and carefully blended with quality creamer to capture all the robust aroma, a richer taste, creamier and more satisfying. With rock sugar and contains no added artificial coffee flavouring.
